title: Tunisian Chicken Salad
description: A flavorful and refreshing salad inspired by Tunisian cuisine, featuring grilled chicken, mixed greens, and a hint of tarragon.

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: such as arugula, spinach, and lettuce

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: such as sea salt or kosher salt

ingredients.name: pepper
ingredients.notes: such as black pepper or white pepper

instructions: Season chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Grill chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, intense salad greens, and chopped tarragon.
Drizzle olive oil and lemon juice over the greens.
Slice grilled chicken and add to the bowl.
Toss to combine and serve immediately.
Optional: add other ingredients such as cherry tomatoes, cucumber, or red onion to the salad.
